$schema: GHXSTSHIP design tokens — source of truth for engineering. Mirrors colors_and_type.css.

font.display: Big Shoulders Display, Arial Narrow, sans-serif
font.body: Space Grotesk, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

rules.wordmark: Display 'G H X S T S H I P' (spaced, white-space:nowrap) on lockups; 'GHXSTSHIP' unspaced for URLs/handles/schema name/IDs.
rules.logo: GHXSTSHIP mark = white flag + black skull (parent company / cosmic marketing only) — never recolor; skull-bone.svg on dark, logo-ghostship-skull.svg on light. ATLVS Technologies product mark = the Waypoint (8-point navigational star): atlvs-mark.svg / atlvs-mark-white.svg, with per-product app-icons atlvs-icon-{atlvs,compvss,gvteway}.svg (white rose on the accent tile). Skull = parent endorsement only, never the product app icon. Spec: ui_kits/atlvs/logo-kit.html.
rules.surfaceRegister: Voyage/spaceport metaphor = marketing surfaces only. Apps/documents/transactional email use plain ERP/PM terms (Project, Dashboard, Timeline, Crew Roster, Sign in). See BRAND_ARCHITECTURE.md.
rules.punctuation: No parentheses in copy — reword. No emoji.
rules.productColors: ATLVS = nebula/pink, COMPVSS = brass/yellow, GVTEWAY = plasma/cyan.
rules.productAudiences: ATLVS = internal — project management, producer & executive facing. COMPVSS = crew, vendor & talent facing. GVTEWAY = guest & client facing.
rules.saasThemeHouseRules: RATIFIED 2026-06-03 (flyingbluewhale) as ATLVS-skin overrides of the cosmic defaults. On the SaaS skin (product-theme.css / [data-ui=saas] / [data-theme=atlvs-product]): (A) CASING — Title Case (not UPPERCASE) for headings, labels, buttons, eyebrows, table headers; body = sentence case. UPPERCASE is retired on the SaaS skin (it renders brand names as 'Atlvs/Compvss/Gvteway' and fights the wordmarks); UPPERCASE remains valid ONLY on the cosmic ghxstship skin. (B) HEADINGS — SaaS skin incl. ATLVS marketing uses the body family (Space Grotesk/Inter) for headings, NOT a display face; Big Shoulders is cosmic-skin-only (the /ghxstship parent-company surface). (C) EYEBROWS — Space Mono on the SaaS skin; Silkscreen pixel is retired for product, cosmic /ghxstship only.
rules.tokenSourceOfTruth: SaaS skin resolves accent/surface/text from the --p-* namespace (product-theme.css). Where legacy --org-*/--color-* vars exist on the atlvs-product skin they MUST be defined as aliases of --p-* / semantic tokens — never independent hex. No raw Tailwind color-scale literals (bg-emerald-500, bg-amber-500, etc.) in components; all color goes through CSS vars. Semantic dot/badge/status colors = the semantic swatches above (success #2FBF71, warning #E9A23B, danger #F23A2F, info #21D4D4).
